texto: The structure of straight coupledom still represents an appropriation of the physical and psychic energy of women to benefit men. And insofar as gay people re-create the straight couple, this structure of violence, domination, and emotional paucity is what they are re-creating. Whatever Beyoncé says about not making a big deal out of the little things, marriage is no more the logical full extension of sexual desire than prison is the utmost expression of sheltering from a rainstorm
explicacao: Citação de Hannah Black sobre temas ligados a amor. “The structure of straight coupledom still represents an appropriation of the physical and psychic…” articula amor, couples, gay em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e casamento.
